title: Evidence Pack
description: Structured output produced by the Researcher agent containing all source material, synthesis, and gap analysis for a documentation job.

schema_version.description: Version of the evidence pack schema.

run_id.description: The pipeline run identifier this evidence pack belongs to.

sources.description: Ordered list of all sources discovered and retrieved during research.

source_id.description: Unique identifier for this source within the evidence pack. Format: src-001, src-002, etc.

type.description: The source system and content type.

id.description: The native identifier in the source system (e.g., ClickUp task ID, Drive file ID, Slack message timestamp).

title.description: Human-readable title or subject line of the source.

content_uri.description: URI to access the source content. May be an internal workspace path for cached content.

relevance_score.description: How directly this source addresses the documentation need. 1.0 = perfectly relevant.

author.description: Person or system that created the source content.

created_at.description: When the source content was originally created.

last_modified.description: When the source content was last modified.

access_status.description: Whether the content was fully accessible.

completeness.description: How much of the source content was captured.

excerpt.description: Key excerpt or abstract from the source. Required if completeness is 'partial' or 'metadata_only'.

tags.description: Classification tags applied by the Researcher (e.g., 'decision', 'requirement', 'specification', 'discussion').

confidence_note.description: Any caveats about this source's reliability or currency.

summary.description: Narrative synthesis of all findings. Must reference sources by source_id using [src:source_id] notation. Should cover: what was found, key themes, contradictions, and overall assessment of evidence sufficiency.

gaps.description: Explicit list of information that was sought but not found.

gap_id.description: Unique identifier for this gap. Format: gap-001, gap-002, etc.

systems_searched.description: Which systems were searched for this query.

reason_not_found.description: Why the information was not found.

impact.description: How this gap affects the document production. 'blocking' means the document cannot be written without this information.

recommendation.description: Suggested action to resolve the gap (e.g., 'Ask project lead', 'Check with DevOps team').

contradictions.description: Cases where sources provide conflicting information.

source_ids.description: The source_ids of the conflicting sources.

researcher_assessment.description: The Researcher's assessment of which source is more likely correct and why.

total_sources.description: Total number of sources in the sources array.

research_duration_ms.description: Total elapsed time for the research cycle in milliseconds.

sufficiency_assessment.description: The Researcher's assessment of whether enough evidence exists to proceed with document creation.

sufficient.description: Whether the evidence is sufficient to write the document.

confidence.description: Confidence that the evidence pack supports successful document creation.

researcher_version.description: Version of the Researcher agent that produced this pack.

search_systems_used.description: Which source systems were actually queried.

created_at.description: When this evidence pack was finalized.

handoff_received_at.description: When the Researcher received the handoff from the Orchestrator.
